summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Smart Election Patrol & Incident Response System with 12 officers. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly. Full incident lifecycle from map selection to officer assignment to tracking to resolution tested successfully. UI upgrade with Google Maps-style pins and compact tracking HUD verified.
passed_tests: GET /api/personnel returns 12 officers with 'free' status
POST /api/incident creates incident and assigns nearest officer
Officer status changes to 'busy' after assignment
PATCH /api/incident/status resolves incident and frees officer
Frontend loads with 12 officer green pins on map (Google Maps-style)
Map click shows blue pin and 'Report Incident' button in bottom card
Report Incident assigns officer, shows 'Unit Assigned' card with officer name, badge, rank, distance, ETA
Assignment card uses icon-based UI without photos/avatars
Accept & Dispatch button starts tracking, shows compact HUD at top-right
Tracking HUD shows live ETA (4.0 min) and Distance (2.70 km) in large numbers
Tracking HUD positioned at top-right does NOT block map view
Officer red pin moves smoothly towards amber incident pin
Blue dashed polyline shows path from officer to incident
After resolution, shows 'Incident Resolved' with 'Report New Incident' button
Full cycle can be repeated - all officers reset after resolution
Toast notifications work correctly for assignment and resolution
Distance and ETA calculations are accurate
Officer movement animation is smooth and realistic
Map tiles load correctly with CARTO Voyager style
Top bar displays 'Election Patrol' with shield icon
